---
title: "Cheatsheets"
toc: true
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.kicker}
ONE PAGE PER WEEK · HTML + PDF
:::
# Cheatsheets
::: {.lead}
Sixteen dense one-pagers — one per week, across the four courses.
View in the browser or download the PDF for printing.
:::
:::

Each cheatsheet condenses a week's five sessions into: the key
decisions, the R functions, the effect sizes or diagnostics to
report, and a short list of pitfalls. They are not a substitute for
the labs — but they are what you want next to you when you are
analysing real data at 6 pm and cannot remember which `glm` family
you want.

## Course 1 — Foundations

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 1
:::
### Toolchain & data hygiene
[HTML](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week1.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week1.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 2
:::
### Describing data, probability, distributions
[HTML](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week2.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week2.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 3
:::
### Sampling, estimation, one-sample inference
[HTML](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week3.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week3.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 4
:::
### Two-group comparisons, associations, reporting
[HTML](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week4.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week4.pdf){download=""}
:::

:::

## Course 2 — Regression, ANOVA & Diagnostics

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 1
:::
### Linear models end-to-end
[HTML](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week1.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week1.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 2
:::
### ANOVA and non-linear extensions
[HTML](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week2.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week2.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 3
:::
### GLMs, ANCOVA, evaluation
[HTML](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week3.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week3.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 4
:::
### Measurement, change, survival, reporting
[HTML](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week4.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course2_regression/cheat_week4.pdf){download=""}
:::

:::

## Course 3 — Design, Longitudinal Data & Causal Inference

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 1
:::
### Designing studies
[HTML](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week1.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week1.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 2
:::
### Missing data, longitudinal, time series
[HTML](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week2.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week2.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 3
:::
### Survival II, causal inference, HTE
[HTML](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week3.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week3.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 4
:::
### Evidence synthesis, ID, pre-registration
[HTML](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week4.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course3_design_causal/cheat_week4.pdf){download=""}
:::

:::

## Course 4 — Modern Statistical Learning & High-Dimensional Biomedicine

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 1
:::
### Validation, regularisation, multivariate
[HTML](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week1.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week1.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 2
:::
### ML done honestly
[HTML](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week2.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week2.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 3
:::
### Bayesian, biomarkers, survival ML
[HTML](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week3.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week3.pdf){download=""}
:::

::: {.card}
::: {.kicker}
WEEK 4
:::
### Omics, fairness, reproducibility
[HTML](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week4.qmd) ·
[PDF](cheatsheets/course4_ml_highdim/cheat_week4.pdf){download=""}
:::

:::

## How they're built

Each cheatsheet is a single `.qmd` in `cheatsheets/courseN_…/` that
declares two output formats:

```yaml
format:
  html: {toc: true, toc-depth: 2, page-layout: full}
  typst: {papersize: a4, margin: {x: 1.8cm, y: 2cm}, fontsize: 10pt}
```

Quarto renders them to both on every site build. The PDF uses Typst
(bundled with Quarto) so no LaTeX install is needed. To render one
locally:

```bash
quarto render cheatsheets/course1_foundations/cheat_week1.qmd
# produces both .html and .pdf in _site / docs
```
